# Barbers Academy of English

> Barbers Academy of English is a private English tuition service based in London, England, founded and taught by Eddie Barber — a CELTA-certified English teacher educated at Repton School (founded 1557). It offers one-to-one British English lessons online worldwide, small group conversation classes, and in-person lessons in London, with British etiquette taught alongside the language.

Key facts:
- Founder and sole tutor: Eddie Barber (CELTA certified; educated at Repton School; also a qualified personal trainer)
- Location: London, United Kingdom; online lessons available worldwide in all time zones
- Lesson formats: private one-to-one (online), small group conversation classes (max six students, online), in-person lessons in central London
- Specialities: British English, pronunciation and received pronunciation (RP), business and professional English, British etiquette and social confidence
- Typical students: adult professionals, families relocating to or visiting the UK, and international learners — many from China, Hong Kong and the Gulf
- Fees: on enquiry; every enquiry answered personally by Eddie Barber, usually within a day
- Contact: eddie@barbersacademyofenglish.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://barbersacademyofenglish.com/): Lessons, about Eddie Barber, how it works, FAQ, and contact form
